triggers.result: You entered the throne hall where the king sits. You need to [1;32mgreet him[0m as usual.
The king nodded after hearing your greeting. Then, he instructed you to find a [1;32mblack pearl[0m in the storage room.
You have found what your father wanted. It is time to bring it to your father.
You heard the king shouting painfully from the [1;32mwest[0m side of this room.

You saw the king being [1;91mstabbed[0m right in his heart by an unknown woman. 
The woman wears a black jumpsuit with a [1;91mturtle logo[0m on her right shoulder. 
You immediately try to launch an attack to the mysterious woman. 
However, she dodges the attack effortlessly and proceeds to [1;91mknock you out[0m. 
Before your consciousness is gone, you heard that she says [1;91m"We will meet again, Huz."[0m 

After a long while, you finally opened your eyes again.

Congrats! You unlocked the your first teleport waypoint. 
You can type [1;32mteleport[0m to go elsewhere.
The guard is wary of you. He immediately try to [1;32mattack[0m you. Tips: use the [1;32mblack pearl[0m to increase your combat stats

You won the combat against the guard. 
Suddenly, [1;91man old man with long white beard[0m comes out. 
Surprisingly, he did not attack you. Instead, tears swelled up in his eyes. 
[1;91m"You're finally back to the Heaven Realm, Huz"[0m. 
You are then taken into a bedroom.

You hear a crying voice from the [1;32meast[0m side. 
You recognize that it is your [1;91msister's voice[0m. 
Tips: use [1;32munlock <direction>[0m command

Your sister rejoiced at your arrival. 
You hug her in relief, and she held you just as tightly. 
Crying, you broke the news of the king death. 
You and your sister then agreed to [1;91mask the old man[0m. 
Surprisingly, the door in the [1;32mwest of the corridor[0m is suddenly being unlocked.

Old man Qing took a glance between you and your sister, then let out a sigh. 
He points to a shelf besides him while saying, "[1;32mBurn[0m this and then you can be free."

All at once, the library was [1;91mengulfed in a ferocious fire[0m. 
Old Man Qing [1;91msmiles faintly[0m before throwing himself into the blazing flame. 
Suddenly, [1;91myour uncle[0m appears from the teleport portal and urges you to [1;32mteleport[0m quickly

Your uncle takes you and your sister to separate room. 
He tells you to rest well and lock the door.

Duke Inqigo is [1;91mfurious[0m after you peek at his notes. 
"What a surprise, little Otuwa. Or should I call you, [1;91mHuz[0m? 
I am tired of playing family with you. Just hold on a little longer - [1;91mafter Bhu, it is your turn[0m." 
Before he leaves, you manage to get a [1;32mmagic crystal[0m from his pocket without him knowing.

Your sister blocks your path. It seems that she already [1;91mpossessed[0m by your uncle's magics. 
With a heavy heart, you have no choice but to [1;32mfight her[0m.

You put your unconscious sister to the side. 
However, when you want to go out, your sister is [1;91mawake and starts strangling[0m you. 
Suddenly, the [1;91mwoman assassin (Xuan)[0m rescues you. 
You told her about your uncle plan and both of you rushes to [1;91mBhu place[0m. 
Tips: use your [1;32mteleport[0m skill.

Xuan told you that Bhu has special lock mechanism in his house. 
You need to unlock it to go to the main house in the [1;32mundergound[0m.

Xuan and you find that Bhu is still in good state. 
[1;32mTalk to him[0m to inform him about the news.
Bhu is actually already [1;91mpossessed[0m by the duke. Immediately prepare for [1;32mcombat[0m!

Suddenly, [1;91mthe soul of Duke Inqigo[0m embodied into an entity and attack you. 
Xuan has her bodies split in half to protect you. 
Before she dies, she collect [1;91mall her remaining powers combined with Bhu[0m to make an elixir. 
She urges you to [1;32mconsume the elixir[0m before fighting with the duke.

You manage to defeat the duke. A gateway to the Heaven Realm is opened in front of you. 
Tips: use [1;32mteleport[0m

You manage to [1;91mrevive all the divine beasts[0m. 
In a mirror next to the door, you can see that your eyes transformed from green-red to all green. 
It seems that all the [1;91mphoenix fragment in you has gone, leaving only the monster fragment[0m. 
You decided to go to your [1;32mbedroom[0m to rest. Tips: use [1;32mteleport[0m

It has been a long journey for you. It is time to rest. Good night. 

[1;32mTHE END[0m
